items.example: We spent the weekend in the countryside.
There's a dense forest behind the village.
We climbed the mountain before sunrise.
The river flows through the valley.
We went swimming in the lake.
Hiking in the mountains is my favourite activity.
We went camping near the lake last summer.
The trail goes through the forest and up the hill.
The valley was covered in mist in the morning.
We saw a beautiful waterfall on our hike.
